author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate health and validate history-drift checks

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found src/cli/commands/health.ts and src/cli/commands/validate.ts repeat the history drift scan and warning construction logic. Representative clones include health.ts:1202-1217 vs validate.ts:1190-1205 and health.ts:1219-1243 vs validate.ts:1206-1230. Search found closed implementation items pm-x0vj/pm-7vr9, but no active follow-up to single-source the check. Fix by extracting a shared history drift diagnostic builder that can render the compact health summary and the validate check payload from one scan result.

Health and validate use one shared history-drift scan/diagnostic implementation; output differences are limited to format adapters; health and validate tests cover the shared warnings; pnpm build passes.

message: Create health/validate duplication finding after duplicate-check search

patch.value: Extracted scanHistoryDrift to src/core/history/drift-scan.ts; health/validate now delegate to shared scan. Merged via PR #54.
